issue_summary: I ordered a laptop but received a used and damaged unit. Customer support kept delaying replacement and then refused refund despite pickup of the item.
timeline: 05 Feb 2026: Order placed and paid online.
08 Feb 2026: Product delivered in damaged condition.
09-20 Feb 2026: Multiple support tickets with no resolution.
22 Feb 2026: Item picked up, but refund not processed.
desired_resolution: Full refund with interest and compensation for inconvenience
